Name: Villain Arc
Description: Step into your evil era. Choose a song that belongs on a revenge playlist, power montage, or super-villain soundtrack.

Name: Rainy Day Music
Description: Cold, gray, and introspective. The soundtrack to sipping coffee and staring out a window.

Name: Singers with Accents
Description: Celebrate global flavour — songs where the singer’s accent is unmistakable and part of the charm.

Name: Tell Me a Story
Description: Submit a track that takes the listener on a narrative journey. Story‑driven songs only.

Name: Snow Day Music
Description: Music for staying in — cosy, chill, or gently dramatic. Picture snowfall and no responsibilities.

Name: Sad/Dark Songs That Slap
Description: For the gloomy days deep into a silent winter. Tracks that are emotionally heavy but still groove.

Name: Christmas Songs
Description: Festive, weird, or nostalgic — any song that says “holiday season” to you. (Parodies welcome!)

Name: Personal Fave – Exploring
Description: New year, new places. What’s on when your playlist while exploring, whether it be city streets or woodland trails, give us the vibe of discovery.

Name: Songs You Sang Wrong For Years
Description: Misheard lyrics, misunderstood meanings — share a song you totally got wrong at first. Bonus points if you share what exactly you were singing wrong!

Name: Current Life Theme Song
Description: What song defines where you’re at right now in life? Be honest, dramatic, or funny.
